Vampires are real.. demons. Witches.. and unicorns and flying dragons were real. Marco polo documented it in his diary when he traveled to china/and other asian lands.. its crazy how ppl go abouts their daily lives they dont even know how much is actually going on in the oceans.. on land away from civilization.. underneath our feet in the crust theres another world. Vampires literally are among everyday ppl new orleans has alot and so does other cities.. ppl are so wrapped up in working just to have a big house. Nice cars.. expensive jewelry.. material things.. ppl are eating fast food like crazy and other processesed food and their brain is rotting. Fun fact: In the original Greek, Unicorns were not friendly or magical or even had healing powers. Neigh-neigh. Unicorns were monsters. They had three-foot spikes coming out of their heads and they liked impaling people on them. This is basically a carbon copy of the original Greek unicorn, lifted and made into a creature feature. I'll watch it if it ever comes to Netflix.
Seems like Jurassic park prehistoric horse edition
Unicorns are real. I seent them !

People don't realize how dangerous a unicorn can be, even in mythology, to slay a unicorn for any reason would anger heaven and the forest would be your enemy. Dungeons And Dragons for example, to slay a unicorn would anger the fey court and they'll want justice for that dead unicorn and they'll do that by using every Beast in the forest on the people who did the deed. In Christian Bestiaries unicorns are basically God's second attempt at making the perfect being.

I just seen this movie tonight …. IDK … I guess I am in the minority on this one … I love science fiction and horror movies ….sadly THIS MOVIE WAS NOT THAT GOOD….. I honestly don’t know where all these rave reviews are coming from … I would give it a “C” at best … it was NOT FUNNY and was NOT SCARY…. It was MARGINALLY ENTERTAINING…. The GGI unicorns were not even very good (although passable) ….Acting was decent … but overall I Found this film to be kinda predictable and just sorta lame and not all that good …. I see it’s had a hood opening week and will likely make a profit …. Watch out for “Death of a Unicorn 2!!!” …. I can hardly wait !!!
